steps.title: Substitute four seconds
steps.content:
The equation gives the van's speed $s$ after $t$ seconds. To find the speed after $4$ seconds, substitute $t=4$:
$$s=38+3(4)$$

steps.title: Calculate the speed
steps.content:
Evaluate the expression:
$$s=38+12=50$$
The van's speed after $4$ seconds is $50$ miles per hour. The answer is D.
